name: The Ultimate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Make the crust: With a fork, toss graham cracker crumbs with butter and sugar until moistened. Transfer to a 9-inch springform pan. Press evenly onto the pan, sides, and bottom. Bake for 5 minutes or until golden. Cool.
3. Heat oven to 450°F.
4. Make the filling: In a large bowl, beat cream cheese with sugar, flour, lemon peel, orange peel, and vanilla until blended. Beat in eggs and yolks one at a time, scraping the bowl occasionally. Stir in heavy cream. Pour into prepared pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
5. Lower temperature to 300°F. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes. The filling mixture will be loose but will set on standing. Cool cake on a wire rack for 2 hours.
6. Spread sour cream over the top of the cake, within 1/2 inch of the edge. Refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
7. To prepare mango sauce: Pare mango and slice the flesh from the pit. Cut into small triangles to make 1/4 cup. Place remaining mango in a food processor. Add sugar. Process until puréed.
8. To prepare raspberry sauce: Puree raspberries with their syrup in a clean food processor. Pour through a sieve placed over a saucepan. Stir in cornstarch. Bring to boiling, simmer for 1 minute (stirring) until thick and clear. Pour into a small bowl. Cover and refrigerate until cold.
9. Remove cake from the pan and place on a serving dish. Spoon mango and raspberry sauces over the top of the cake. Garnish with diced mango, kiwifruit, and fresh raspberries. Pass remaining fruit sauces.
